component.name: ConfigTask
component.script:
sub init() m.top.functionName = "run" end sub
sub run() cfg = GQConfig() url = cfg.webAppUrl if Right(url, 1) <> "/" then url = url + "/" url = url + "data/tv.json"
port = CreateObject("roMessagePort") xfer = CreateObject("roUrlTransfer") xfer.setMessagePort(port) xfer.setCertificatesFile("common:/certs/ca-bundle.crt") xfer.initClientCertificates() xfer.setUrl(url)
out = { ok: false } if xfer.asyncGetToString() then ev = wait(12000, port) if type(ev) = "roUrlEvent" and ev.getResponseCode() = 200 then parsed = ParseJson(ev.getString()) if parsed <> invalid and parsed.menus <> invalid then out.ok = true out.data = parsed end if end if end if m.top.result = out m.top.done = true end sub
